children.text: The teenagers are in the park and see a woman shouting at her son.
children.cn: 青少年们在公园里，看到一个女人在冲她儿子喊叫。

children.text: Well, we all know what that's like - your parents, shouting at you.
children.cn: 嗯，我们都知道那是怎么回事——你父母冲你大喊大叫。
children.notes: what that's like 意为“那是怎么回事/那是什么感觉”。
children.statement: Olivia认为被父母吼叫是青少年普遍经历的事情。
children.explanation: 她说“we all know”，暗示大家都有共鸣。

children.text: Megan talks about her father being stressed.
He's got a big business meeting he has to attend, out of town tomorrow and Friday.
children.cn: 他明后天在城外有一个必须参加的大型商务会议。
children.notes: attend a meeting 参加会议；out of town 城外/出差。
children.statement: Megan的父亲本周四和周五要在城里开会。
children.explanation: 文中说的是“out of town”，即出差/在城外。

children.text: But I know one thing: he shouts at me all the time. Everything I do is wrong.
children.cn: 但我知道一件事：他一直对我大喊大叫。我做的每件事都是错的。
children.notes: shout at sb. 对某人喊叫；all the time 一直/总是。
children.statement: Megan觉得自己和父亲的关系非常和谐。
children.explanation: 她说父亲总是吼她，且认为她做错事，说明关系有些紧张。
children.keywords: shouts at me, all the time

children.text: Megan is looking forward to growing up.
Another few years and I can leave home! I can't wait!
children.cn: 再过几年我就可以离开家了！我等不及了！
children.notes: leave home 离开家/独立生活；can't wait 等不及。

children.text: And when we're parents, we'll be just the same as our parents. Wait and see.
children.cn: 当我们成为父母时，我们会和我们的父母一模一样。等着瞧吧。
children.notes: the same as 和...一样；Wait and see 等着瞧。
children.statement: Ryan认为他们长大后会和现在的父母表现得不一样。
children.explanation: Ryan说“we'll be just the same”，意为会一模一样。

children.text: Megan receives an unexpected phone call.
children.cn: Megan接到了一个意外的电话。

children.text: Shh!! Dad, say that again. What? The hospital? Mum?
children.cn: 嘘！！爸爸，再说一遍。什么？医院？妈妈？
children.notes: 这句话预示着故事发生了转折。
children.statement: Megan接到电话后得知妈妈在医院。
children.explanation: 她重复了“The hospital? Mum?”，说明听到了这个消息。
